result.title: Drug Information Results
result.subtitle: This information is for reference only. Consult a pharmacist before taking medication.
result.otcAvailable: This drug is available over-the-counter without prescription in {{country}}
result.ingredientFallback: No registered brand found for this country. Ask your pharmacist for a product containing this ingredient.

onboarding.intro: Quickly find the right OTC drug information for your symptoms.
items: This service provides over-the-counter (OTC) drug information, not medical diagnosis or prescriptions.
The information provided is for reference only. Please consult a pharmacist or medical professional before taking any medication.
The service provider assumes no legal liability for any consequences arising from the use of information provided by this service.
This service does not provide advice for emergency situations. In case of emergency, please call 119 or your local emergency number immediately.
onboarding.agreeCheck: I have read and agree to the above

disclaimer.short: This service provides OTC drug information, not medical diagnosis.
disclaimer.full: This service does not provide medical diagnosis or prescriptions. The information provided is general OTC drug information. Please consult a doctor or pharmacist for accurate diagnosis and treatment.
